notes: The Airtame 2 has no bare HDMI port on its body; HDMI output is delivered via the bundled AirCord Y-cable (USB-C on the device end, splitting to HDMI + USB-A). HDMI spec is 1.4b per official Airtame technical specification documents. Power is supplied through the same USB-C port at 5V up to 2.4A. The Micro USB OTG port is for optional wired Ethernet only. Official PDF spec sheets were not machine-readable; specs confirmed via multiple secondary retail/reseller sources referencing Airtame's published technical specification (September 2019 / November 2020 versions). Ethernet speed not explicitly stated in accessible sources — USB-2.0 OTG implies 100 Mbps class adapter at most. No rack-mount form factor.

ports.name: USB-C (AirCord / Power / HDMI / Ethernet)
ports.note: Multifunctional: power input (5V/2.4A), HDMI 1.4b output via bundled AirCord Y-cable (USB-C to HDMI + USB-A), USB host, and Ethernet via adapter. No bare HDMI socket on device body — HDMI is provided through the AirCord cable assembly.

ports.name: Micro USB OTG
ports.note: Used for wired Ethernet connectivity via an external USB-to-Ethernet adapter (sold separately).
